description.value:
[3 actions] Archetype, Concentrate

You launch a rapid barrage of stretched-fist strikes in all directions. Make 4 unarmed Strikes, distributing them however you choose among creatures within 15 feet. All attacks use your current multiple attack penalty, but that penalty increases by only 2 for each Strike after the first (instead of the normal 5/10). You can target the same creature more than once.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
